name: Blackbox AI
description: Blackbox AI — AI code generation assistant and browser extension for extracting and completing code from any screen.

seo.title: Blackbox AI — Code Assistants / Agent Tooling
seo.meta_description: Blackbox AI: Blackbox AI — AI code generation assistant and browser extension for extracting and completing code from any screen.

when_to_use: Extracting code from screenshots and Stack Overflow answers
Getting AI completions in any browser-based coding environment
Building with AI-assisted code generation from visual references
Searching code from any web page and pasting into IDE instantly

pros: Free tier with generous usage for hobbyists
Browser extension extracts code from videos and screenshots
Wide IDE support including VS Code and JetBrains
Fast autocomplete with minimal setup friction
cons: Code quality inconsistent versus Copilot or Claude
Aggressive marketing and unclear data practices
Chat answers often shallow and lack reasoning depth
Privacy policy around training on user code is murky
review.verdict: Usable free alternative with gimmicky extras, but quality and trust lag the serious competitors.
review.best_for: Students and hobbyists who want free autocomplete and screen-to-code extraction
review.not_for: Professional teams with proprietary code or strict data governance requirements
